TextView.android:text:
Progress Tracking

1. Journaling
Write down daily achievements; helps you see patterns of growth and areas for improvement.

2. Habit Tracking
Use a simple checklist or app to mark daily wins; builds consistency and visual proof of effort.

3. Before and After
Take photos or notes at the start; provides a powerful visual reminder of how far you have come.

4. Benchmark Testing
Set a monthly fitness or skill test; measuring specific numbers makes your progress undeniable.

5. Reviewing Goals
Revisit your targets every week; ensures you stay aligned with your long-term vision.

6. Celebrating Small Wins
Reward minor milestones; keeps morale high and prevents burnout during long projects.

7. Feedback Loops
Ask for constructive input from mentors or peers; provides an outside perspective on your growth.

8. Time Blocking
Track how you spend your hours; reveals if your daily actions actually match your priorities.

9. Mood Tracking
Note how you feel alongside your tasks; helps you understand the mental impact of your progress.

10. Reflection Sessions
Spend 10 minutes each Sunday looking back; helps you plan a better path for the following week.
